arts.ttl: Tuesday's La Liga predictions including Real Madrid vs. Alaves
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Alaves.

arts.ttl: Possible Real Madrid line-up for Alavés clash with Ancelotti set to rotate
arts.sum: Lucas Vázquez will replace Carvajal with the Spanish international picking up a slight knock in the game against Espanyol and Tchouameni could partner Rüdiger giving some respite to Militao with Mendy expected to return to left-back at the expense of Fran García. The potential XI for the Alavés clash could see: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Tchouameni, Rüdiger, Mendy; Modric, Valverde, Bellingham; Rodrygo, Endrick/Mbappé and Vinicius .

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti sends clear message to Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: Speaking to the media ahead of Real Madrid's LaLiga clash with Alaves, the 65-year-old insisted that the pressure of coaching arguably the biggest club in the world does not faze him and that he is keen to keep his job for many seasons to come. Carlo Ancelotti is hoping to stay at Real Madrid for 'many years.'
